extras.ctaTitle: Get a job instantly with just a Call or WhatsApp
extras.ctaBody: Skip long forms. Reach our hiring desk through a quick call or WhatsApp and we will match you to a verified opening near you.
extras.faqBody: Everything you should know about applying, fees and verification on LAKSHYA.

faqs.q: Is there any fee to apply for jobs on LAKSHYA?
faqs.a: No. Applying for any job on LAKSHYA is completely free for seekers. We never ask for money to share contact details or schedule interviews.

faqs.q: What documents do I need to apply?
faqs.a: An Aadhaar card is enough to get started. A few roles may additionally ask for a driving licence or a basic skill certificate.

faqs.q: Can I get a job without prior experience?
faqs.a: Yes. Many roles such as delivery, helper and cleaner welcome freshers. The job card clearly mentions the required experience.

faqs.q: How quickly will I hear back after applying?
faqs.a: Most verified employers respond within 30 minutes during working hours. You will get a call or WhatsApp message directly.

about.title: From every village, to every workplace — for Bharat.
about.subtitle: LAKSHYA is a verified, hyperlocal employment platform connecting blue-collar workers with trusted employers across India.
about.storyTitle: Building the quick-commerce layer for work
about.storyBody: Millions of skilled workers in Bharat still rely on word-of-mouth, middlemen, and long commutes to find their next shift. LAKSHYA changes that — with verified listings, local matching, and support in your language.
about.storyBody2: Whether you are a driver, electrician, cook, or security guard — or an MSME hiring your next team member — we help you connect faster, fairly, and with full transparency.

highlights.title: Verified opportunities
highlights.body: Every employer and listing is reviewed so seekers see real jobs — not scams or hidden fees.

highlights.title: Hyperlocal matching
highlights.body: Find work within your commute radius. Employers discover talent already near their workplace.

highlights.title: Multilingual support
highlights.body: Browse, apply, and get help in English, Hindi, or Odia — by app, call, or WhatsApp.

impact.title: Built for scale across Bharat
impact.subtitle: We started hyperlocal and are expanding city by city — with zero registration fees for job seekers.

metrics.label: Cities
metrics.hint: From tier-1 metros to district towns

metrics.label: Job roles
metrics.hint: Driver to welder, cook to security

metrics.label: Seeker fees
metrics.hint: Free to register, browse, and apply

sectors.title: Everyday work. Every major sector.
sectors.subtitle: LAKSHYA focuses on roles that keep Bharat running — on the shop floor, on the road, and on-site.

items.name: Logistics & delivery
items.body: Drivers, riders, warehouse helpers, and last-mile partners for growing e-commerce and retail.

items.name: Manufacturing & trades
items.body: Machine operators, welders, fitters, electricians, and line workers for MSMEs and plants.

items.name: Hospitality & food
items.body: Cooks, kitchen staff, housekeeping, and front-of-house roles in hotels and QSR chains.

items.name: Security & facilities
items.body: Guards, cleaners, maintenance staff, and facility helpers for offices and residential sites.

items.name: Retail & sales
items.body: In-store promoters, cashiers, stock handlers, and field sales for local brands.

items.name: Construction & infra
items.body: Masons, helpers, supervisors, and site labour for builders and contractors.

journey.title: From Bhubaneswar to pan-Bharat
journey.subtitle: LAKSHYA was founded to fix a simple problem — talented workers and honest employers couldn't find each other fast enough.

milestones.title: LAKSHYA launches in Odisha
milestones.body: Pilot with local MSMEs and hyperlocal job matching in Bhubaneswar and nearby districts.

milestones.title: Multilingual platform goes live
milestones.body: English, Hindi, and Odia support — plus WhatsApp and call-based onboarding for first-time users.

milestones.title: Verified employer network grows
milestones.body: Document checks, workplace photos, and review workflows so seekers trust every listing.

milestones.title: Expanding across Bharat
milestones.body: Scaling to new cities with the same promise — fair pay, clear roles, and jobs near home.

contact.title: We are here to help
contact.subtitle: Reach our team for job support, employer onboarding, or platform questions. We respond quickly on call and WhatsApp.
contact.reachBody: Prefer a quick chat? Call or message us — our support team helps seekers and employers across Bharat.
contact.helpBody: Our team assists with account issues, job listings, applications, and safety concerns.
contact.hoursBody: Monday to Saturday, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM IST. WhatsApp messages are answered within 30 minutes during business hours.
contact.safetyBody: Never pay anyone for a job on LAKSHYA. Report suspicious employers with screenshots — we review every report.
contact.address: 2nd Floor, SS Niwas, <companyLink>Hirekarma Private Limited</companyLink>, Raghunathpur, Bhubaneswar, Raghunathpurjali, Odisha 751024

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Rules for using LAKSHYA — the employment platform operated by Hirekarma Private Limited.

sections.title: 1. About LAKSHYA
sections.body: LAKSHYA is an online employment platform owned and operated by Hirekarma Private Limited ("Hirekarma", "we", "us"). By accessing or using LAKSHYA, you agree to these Terms of Service.

sections.title: 2. Eligibility
sections.body: You must be at least 18 years old and legally able to work in India to register as a job seeker or employer. You agree to provide accurate information in your profile and job listings.

sections.title: 3. Job seekers
sections.body: LAKSHYA does not charge job seekers a registration or application fee. Never pay a third party claiming to guarantee a job through LAKSHYA. Report suspicious listings to our support team.

sections.title: 4. Employers
sections.body: Employers must post genuine job openings with clear role details, location, and compensation. We may review, reject, or remove listings that are misleading, discriminatory, or violate applicable law.

sections.title: 5. Acceptable use
sections.body: You may not scrape, spam, impersonate others, upload malware, or use the platform for unlawful purposes. We may suspend or terminate accounts that breach these terms.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of liability
sections.body: LAKSHYA connects seekers and employers but does not employ workers directly. Hirekarma is not responsible for wages, working conditions, or disputes between users, except as required by applicable law.

sections.title: 7. Changes
sections.body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of LAKSHYA after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How Hirekarma Private Limited collects, uses, and protects your data on LAKSHYA.

sections.title: 1. Who we are
sections.body: Hirekarma Private Limited operates LAKSHYA from 2nd Floor, SS Niwas, Raghunathpur, Bhubaneswar, Raghunathpurjali, Odisha 751024. This policy explains how we handle personal information on the platform.

sections.title: 2. Information we collect
sections.body: We collect information you provide when you register, create a profile, post or apply for jobs, upload documents, or contact support — such as name, phone, email, location, skills, and resume files.

sections.title: 3. How we use information
sections.body: We use your data to operate LAKSHYA, match seekers with nearby jobs, verify employers, improve our services, send service-related messages, and comply with legal obligations.

sections.title: 4. Sharing
sections.body: Job seeker profiles and applications may be shared with employers you apply to. We do not sell personal data. We may share data with service providers who help us host, secure, or support the platform.

sections.title: 5. Security & retention
sections.body: We use reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect your data. We retain information while your account is active and as needed for legal, security, or business purposes.

sections.title: 6. Your choices
sections.body: You may update profile information in your account settings or contact us to request access, correction, or deletion of your data, subject to applicable law and legitimate business needs.

sections.title: 7. Contact
sections.body: For privacy questions, reach us through the Contact page or the support channels listed on LAKSHYA.

refer.title: Find verified work.
refer.body: Browse local blue-collar jobs, apply in your language, and track every application — no registration charges and no middlemen.

blocks.label: Our Vision
blocks.body: Unlock 100 million jobs by empowering 10 million MSMEs and enterprises across Bharat.

blocks.label: Our Mission
blocks.body: Build the most trusted, accessible employment platform — structured, scalable, inclusive.

blocks.label: Our Purpose
blocks.body: Bridge the rural–urban, formal–informal, skilled–unskilled gaps with one verified network.

blocks.label: Our Promise
blocks.body: Fair pay, clear expectations, and verified opportunities for every worker — every time.

steps.d: Sign up in your language. Add your skills, location and availability in under two minutes.
Our engine surfaces verified roles within your commute radius — updated in real time.
Accept, interview, and join. Wages paid directly to your UPI after every shift.

what.title: A multilingual, multimodal employment network for Bharat.
what.body: LAKSHYA lets anyone discover a job through voice, text, or a quick call — in their own language. We are building the quick-commerce layer for work.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: We are here to help you find the right job.

faqs.q: Is there any fee to apply for jobs on LAKSHYA?
faqs.a: No. Applying for any job on LAKSHYA is completely free for seekers. We never ask for money to share contact details or schedule interviews.

faqs.q: What documents do I need to apply?
faqs.a: An Aadhaar card is enough to get started. A few roles may additionally ask for a driving licence or a basic skill certificate.

faqs.q: Can I get a job without prior experience?
faqs.a: Yes. Many roles such as delivery, helper and cleaner welcome freshers. The job card clearly mentions the required experience.

faqs.q: How quickly will I hear back after applying?
faqs.a: Most verified employers respond within 30 minutes during working hours. You will get a call or WhatsApp message directly.

faqs.q: How do I update my profile or resume?
faqs.a: Open My Profile, tap Edit profile, change your details and save. Upload your resume in the Resume section — it helps employers shortlist you faster.

faqs.q: Someone asked me to pay for a guaranteed job. What should I do?
faqs.a: Do not pay. Legitimate employers on LAKSHYA do not charge seekers for jobs. Contact us on WhatsApp with screenshots so we can review the employer.

guides.title: Build a strong profile
guides.body: Add your photo, correct location, education and skills. A complete profile gets more views from verified employers.

guides.title: Apply in a few taps
guides.body: Browse Find Jobs, open a listing you like and apply once. Track every application from the Applications tab.

guides.title: Save jobs for later
guides.body: Use the save icon on a job card to keep openings in Saved Jobs so you can compare before you apply.

help.safetyBody: Your safety matters. LAKSHYA is built for transparent hiring — never pay for a job promise.
safetyItems: Never pay cash or UPI to a stranger for a “guaranteed” placement.
Do not share OTPs, card PINs or net-banking passwords with anyone claiming to be an employer.
If a listing looks fake or abusive, report it to us with screenshots on WhatsApp.
help.hoursBody: Our team usually answers calls and WhatsApp between 9 am – 7 pm, Monday to Saturday (India time).

help.title: Help & Support
help.subtitle: We are here to help you hire verified blue-collar talent across Bharat.

faqs.q: Is posting jobs on LAKSHYA free?
faqs.a: Yes. Creating an employer account and posting verified job openings is free. We do not charge per application or per hire on the platform.

faqs.q: How do I publish a job for seekers to see?
faqs.a: Open Job Management, tap Post New Job, complete the wizard and publish. Active jobs appear on the public jobs page and in seeker search.

faqs.q: How can I find and contact candidates?
faqs.a: Use Seeker Feed to search and filter workers by skill and location. Save profiles you like and reach applicants from Job Management.

faqs.q: How do I update my company profile?
faqs.a: Go to Company Profile and tap Edit Profile. Update contact details, location, logo and workplace photos, then save.

faqs.q: A candidate asked me to pay a fee before joining. Is that normal?
faqs.a: No. Ethical hiring does not require seekers to pay joining fees. Report suspicious behaviour to LAKSHYA support with screenshots.

faqs.q: How long does support take to respond?
faqs.a: During business hours we usually reply on call or WhatsApp within 30 minutes. Email may take up to one working day.

guides.title: Complete your company profile
guides.body: Add accurate contact details, location and workplace photos so seekers trust your brand before they apply.

guides.title: Post and manage jobs
guides.body: Create listings from Job Management, track applicants and close roles when filled. Draft jobs stay private until you publish.

guides.title: Shortlist from Seeker Feed
guides.body: Browse available workers near you, save promising profiles and invite them to apply to your open roles.

help.safetyBody: Fair hiring protects your brand and workers. LAKSHYA supports transparent, fee-free recruitment for blue-collar roles.
safetyItems: Do not ask candidates for cash, UPI or “security deposits” to get a job.
Verify identity and skills before onboarding; keep records as per your company policy.
Report fake profiles or abusive messages to support with screenshots on WhatsApp.
help.hoursBody: Our team usually answers calls and WhatsApp between 9 am – 7 pm, Monday to Saturday (India time).
